refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs targeting key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency) allows clearer design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that optimized equipment operation and task execution meet or exceed targets.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to reduce idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Implement task scheduling and coordination system to optimize task execution efficiency.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address FR1 and FR2 respectively.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling may cause coupling.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically distinct but require interface coordination; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control and scheduling.
Risk that task scheduling delays may reduce realized productivity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor coupling during integration and consider modular interface refinement if coupling increases.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Realizes DP1: advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives telemetry data and sends operational status.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task execution commands from Teleoperation or NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module is primary containment for vehicle control DP with minimal diffusion.
Teleoperation interfaces with tasking but does not contain vehicle control logic.
NGHE Solution coordinates but does not directly implement vehicle control.
Safety Services unrelated to vehicle control DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is best suited to contain the vehicle control DP due to direct hardware interface and control responsibilities.
containment_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic into Teleoperation or NGHE Solution modules if interfaces are not well defined.
Risk of duplicated control algorithms if coordination is poor.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define strict interface contracts and ownership boundaries to prevent diffusion and duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly maps to selected DPs with manageable coupling and clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Risk of control logic duplication across Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment score and is appropriate ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring module telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with explicit interface definitions.

recommended_revisions: Monitor interface definitions to avoid diffusion.
Consider adding explicit task scheduling IM assignment in next decomposition level.

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, the IM assignment currently covers only DP1 (vehicle control). DP2 (task scheduling) requires explicit IM assignment to Teleoperation or NGHE Solution to complete the architectural mapping.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to reduce idle and transition times.

revise.why: To assign DP2 to an appropriate IM boundary and define its interfaces, ensuring full coverage of the refined FR.

assumptions: Telemetry and Tasking interfaces are reliable and provide necessary data.
Vehicle module can contain advanced control algorithms.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic across modules.
Unassigned DP2 IM boundary may cause architectural gaps.
evidence_needed: Interface usage data between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and NGHE Solution.
Verification results of productivity metrics during representative operations.
